objections.description: Dismissing PG normalization as 'benchmark hygiene' is a critical strategic error. The caveat explicitly states PG is 'likely under-scored'. Optimizing Hybrid ranking (Option 2) while relying on potentially invalid ground truth signals risks overfitting to grader artifacts rather than improving true retrieval quality. Metric validity must precede optimization.
objections.suggested_fix: Prioritize Option 1 to validate the PG baseline. Conduct a manual audit of 10 PG failures to quantify the grading discrepancy before committing engineering cycles to Hybrid tuning.

suggestions.description: Add a validation step to measure the false-negative rate of the PG grader before selecting an optimization path.
